name: Sahar
tagline: Sahar — سحر · a free, offline-first education app for children denied school (literacy/numeracy/science/critical-thinking, Dari/EN/DE, spaced repetition). Scaffold + working prototype, not yet a finished product.
eta: ongoing — lanes land continuously, no fixed ship date
gatedOn: an adult-supervised pilot before any 'ready for real learners' claim (SAHAR-COVERAGE-STATUS.md §3 DoD)
nextAction: Prep the adult-supervised pilot as a TEXT-FIRST pilot (decision 2026-07-19: v1 = text-first; draft machine audio stays optional + flagged and never blocks a lesson; real human Dari audio = funded-phase deliverable, next candidate window Prototype Fund Oct–Nov 2026 — see audio/DARI-AUDIO-SOURCING-2026-07-19.md).

subphases.title: Curriculum + naming + architecture + open-source plan documented

decisions.decision: v1 ships TEXT-FIRST; real human Dari audio is deferred to the funded phase (next candidate grant window: Prototype Fund, Oct–Nov 2026). The flagged edge-tts draft voice stays as an optional extra that never blocks a lesson.
decisions.why: Verified twice (docs/voice-research/VOICE-RESEARCH.md + audio/DARI-AUDIO-SOURCING-2026-07-19.md): no Dari TTS voice or dataset exists anywhere in 2026, Mo/Neda cannot record, and the only honest sources (paid Afghan-Dari VO ~$150–400 or adult diaspora volunteer) cost money/time that fits the funded phase — REAL 90 > FAKE 100.
rejected: shipping an Iranian-Persian voice as Dari (accent-dishonest, teaches wrong sounds)
waiting for a better TTS (no Dari training data exists — a stall, not a path)
blocking the pilot on audio (the app is fully usable text-first)

_stub: auto-stamped 2026-07-11 (WHERE+WHEN wave) — first .mc/project.json for this repo; fill in phases/swot/decisions as the tracker grows
